FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the user who created the file record

FIELD.NAME: cmid
FIELD.COMMENT: Course module id for the related resource

FIELD.NAME: modulename
FIELD.COMMENT: Name of the related module or component

FIELD.NAME: resourceid
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the related resource or activity instance

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the course containing the resource

FIELD.NAME: filename
FIELD.COMMENT: Name of the uploaded file

FIELD.NAME: content
FIELD.COMMENT: Stored file content or encoded payload

FIELD.NAME: original_content
FIELD.COMMENT: Original unmodified text content

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: Time when the record was last modified

FIELD.NAME: uploaded
FIELD.COMMENT: Flag indicating whether the file has been uploaded to the API

FIELD.NAME: questionid
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional related question id

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the user who added the comment

FIELD.NAME: cmid
FIELD.COMMENT: Course module id for the related resource

FIELD.NAME: modulename
FIELD.COMMENT: Name of the related module or component

FIELD.NAME: resourceid
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the related resource or activity instance

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the course containing the resource

FIELD.NAME: usercomment
FIELD.COMMENT: Text of the user comment

FIELD.NAME: questionid
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional related question id

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: Time when the comment was last modified

TABLE.NAME: tiny_cursive_user_writing
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores writing and typing metrics for a file

FIELD.NAME: file_id
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the related file record

FIELD.NAME: total_time_seconds
FIELD.COMMENT: Total writing duration in seconds

FIELD.NAME: key_count
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of keys pressed

FIELD.NAME: keys_per_minute
FIELD.COMMENT: Typing speed measured in keys per minute

FIELD.NAME: character_count
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of characters typed

FIELD.NAME: characters_per_minute
FIELD.COMMENT: Typing speed measured in characters per minute

FIELD.NAME: word_count
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of words typed

FIELD.NAME: words_per_minute
FIELD.COMMENT: Typing speed measured in words per minute

FIELD.NAME: backspace_percent
FIELD.COMMENT: Percentage of keystrokes that were backspaces

FIELD.NAME: score
FIELD.COMMENT: Computed score for the writing session

FIELD.NAME: copy_behavior
FIELD.COMMENT: Metric tracking copy/paste behavior

FIELD.NAME: quality_access
FIELD.COMMENT: Access flag for quality metrics

FIELD.NAME: reconstructed_text
FIELD.COMMENT: Original content

FIELD.NAME: submitted_text
FIELD.COMMENT: Difference html content

FIELD.NAME: meta
FIELD.COMMENT: extra field for optional use
